title: hieracium subcymigerum
intro: Hieracium subcymigerum, also known as sub-cymiger hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium subcymigerum are said to include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory problems, as well as its potential to act as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of Hieracium subcymigerum are typically made from the plant's leaves, roots, and flowers, and can be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures.
